member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.AnalyticsController.RecordStream(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Analytics.Commands.RecordStream.RecordStreamCommand)
member.summary: Records a track stream by a user. (Listener ID can be null for anonymous streams).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.AnalyticsController.GetDashboardStats(System.String)
member.summary: Gets dashboard statistic cards for an artist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.AnalyticsController.GetStreamHistory(System.String,System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Gets stream history for plotting charts for an artist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.CommentController.Post(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Comments.Commands.CreateComment.CreateCommentCommand)
member.summary: Post a new comment or reply to a track.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.CommentController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a comment authored by the current user.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.CommentController.GetByTrack(System.Guid,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Comments.Queries.GetCommentsByTrack.GetCommentsByTrackParameter)
member.summary: Get paginated comments for a specific track.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.FollowerController.ToggleFollow(System.String)
member.summary: Toggles follow status for an artist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.FollowerController.CheckStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the current user is following the artist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.FollowerController.GetCount(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the total number of followers for an artist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.FollowerController.GetFollowersByArtist(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Followers.Queries.GetFollowersByArtist.GetFollowersByArtistParameter)
member.summary: Gets the paginated list of followers of an artist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.FollowerController.GetFollowingByUser(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Followers.Queries.GetFollowingByUser.GetFollowingByUserParameter)
member.summary: Gets the paginated list of artists the user is following.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.LikeController.ToggleLike(System.Guid)
member.summary: Toggles like status (Like if not liked, Unlike if liked).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.LikeController.CheckStatus(System.Guid)
member.summary: Check if the current user has liked the track.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.LikeController.GetByTrack(System.Guid,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Likes.Queries.GetLikesByTrack.GetLikesByTrackParameter)
member.summary: Gets all users who liked a track (paginated).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.LikeController.GetByUser(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Likes.Queries.GetLikesByUser.GetLikesByUserParameter)
member.summary: Gets all tracks liked by a specific user (paginated).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.PlaylistController.Create(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Playlists.Commands.CreatePlaylist.CreatePlaylistCommand)
member.summary: Create a new playlist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.PlaylistController.Update(System.Guid,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Playlists.Commands.UpdatePlaylist.UpdatePlaylistCommand)
member.summary: Update playlist information.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.PlaylistController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a playlist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.PlaylistController.AddTrack(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Add a track to a playlist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.PlaylistController.RemoveTrack(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Remove a track from a playlist.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.PlaylistController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get a playlist with its tracks.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.PlaylistController.GetByUser(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Playlists.Queries.GetPlaylistsByUser.GetPlaylistsByUserParameter)
member.summary: Get paginated playlists for a user.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ShareController.RecordShare(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Shares.Commands.RecordShare.RecordShareCommand)
member.summary: Record a track share to a platform.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.TrackController.Get(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Tracks.Queries.GetAllTracks.GetAllTracksParameter)
member.summary: Get all music tracks (paginated). Requires authentication.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.TrackController.Post(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Tracks.Commands.CreateTrack.CreateTrackCommand)
member.summary: Create a new music track.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.TrackController.Get(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get a music track by id. Requires authentication.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.TrackController.Put(System.Guid,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Tracks.Commands.UpdateTrack.UpdateTrackCommand)
member.summary: Update a music track.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.TrackController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a music track.
